title: One in six young people will not be in work or training in five years without action, report warns
summary: A major review warns that without intervention, one in six young people will be neither employed nor in training within five years. This highlights significant risks to youth employment and economic participation.
content: One in six young people will not be in work or training in five years without action, according to a major review.

zh.title: 报告警告：五年内六分之一年轻人若无干预将无业或无培训
zh.summary: 一份重大审查警告，若无干预，五年内六分之一的年轻人将既不就业也不参加培训。这凸显了青年就业和经济参与的重大风险。

title: Ousted BP chair Albert Manifold rejects ‘lies’ over his conduct
summary: BP's board removed chair Albert Manifold over serious governance and conduct concerns. Manifold denies the allegations, disputing what he characterizes as false accusations.
content: BP's board on Tuesday announced the removal of Manifold due to "serious concerns" relating to governance standards, oversight and conduct.

zh.title: 被撤职的BP董事长阿尔伯特·曼尼福尔德否认关于其行为的"谎言"
zh.summary: 英国石油公司董事会因严重的治理和行为问题撤销了董事长阿尔伯特·曼尼福尔德的职位。曼尼福尔德否认这些指控，质疑他所说的虚假指控。

title: European stocks open lower as traders assess chances of Iran peace deal
summary: European stock markets opened lower as traders evaluate the likelihood of a peace agreement to resolve the Iran war. Market uncertainty around geopolitical developments is pressuring investor sentiment.
content: European stocks opened in negative territory on Thursday as investors assess the prospects of a peace deal to end the Iran war.

zh.title: 欧洲股市下跌，交易员评估伊朗和平协议的可能性
zh.summary: 欧洲股票市场下跌，交易员评估解决伊朗战争的和平协议的可能性。地缘政治发展的市场不确定性正在打压投资者情绪。

title: Why Ferrari’s rocky EV launch may not be the disaster investors fear
summary: Ferrari's first all-electric vehicle has faced considerable criticism, yet analysis suggests the challenges may not prove as catastrophic as investors worry. The situation reflects broader industry challenges in luxury EV transitions.
content: Ferrari has endured a firestorm of criticism following the launch of its first fully electric vehicle.

zh.title: 为什么法拉利电动汽车的坎坷推出可能不是投资者担心的灾难
zh.summary: 法拉利首款全电动汽车面临了不少批评,但分析表明这些挑战可能不会像投资者担心的那样灾难性。这反映了豪华电动汽车过渡中更广泛的行业挑战。

title: The £5 coffee that tells a story of global economic turmoil
summary: Coffee prices have reached £5 in some UK city centers, reflecting a complex interplay of tariffs, climate impacts, changing consumer preferences, and commodity market dynamics. The price surge illustrates broader global economic pressures.
content: Coffees at some city centre outlets now cost £5. It's a story of tariffs, the climate, Gen Z cultural tastes, and savvy coffee farmers playing the market, writes Faisal Islam

zh.title: 5英镑咖啡讲述的全球经济困境故事
zh.summary: 英国一些城市中心的咖啡价格已升至5英镑,反映了关税、气候影响、消费者偏好变化和商品市场动态的复杂相互作用。价格上涨反映了更广泛的全球经济压力。

title: Energy inflation has been more persistent than expected, Fed's Goolsbee tells CNBC
summary: Federal Reserve official Goolsbee notes that energy inflation has proven more stubborn than anticipated, with oil prices remaining substantially elevated despite recent declines. This persistence complicates inflation management and monetary policy.
content: While oil prices have recently fallen on news that a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran could come, prices are still significantly higher than before the war.

zh.title: 能源通胀比预期更为持久,美联储官员古尔斯比告诉美国全国广播公司商业频道
zh.summary: 美联储官员古尔斯比指出,能源通胀已被证明比预期更为顽固,尽管最近有所下降,但油价仍保持相当高的水平。这种持久性使通胀管理和货币政策变得复杂。

title: U.S. regulator moves to withdraw $5 million penalty against Winklevoss' crypto exchange
summary: The CFTC has moved to reverse a $5 million penalty against the Winklevoss twins' cryptocurrency exchange. The action signals a potential shift in regulatory approach toward crypto platforms.
content: The U.S. CFTC asked a judge on Wednesday to vacate the agency's $5 million penalty against a cryptocurrency exchange founded by the Winklevoss twins.

zh.title: 美国监管机构提议撤销对Winklevoss加密货币交易所500万美元的罚款
zh.summary: 美国商品期货交易委员会（CFTC）提议撤销对Winklevoss兄弟加密货币交易所的500万美元罚款。此举表明监管机构对加密货币平台的监管方式可能出现转变。

title: Nio shares jump 10% after releasing first flagship EV in more than two years
summary: Chinese EV maker Nio's stock surged 10% following the launch of its first flagship electric vehicle in over two years. The move reflects Nio's strategy to expand market presence amid challenging Chinese automotive demand.
content: Chinese electric car company Nio has launched two lower-priced brands in the last two years to broaden its customer base in a sluggish Chinese consumer market.

zh.title: 蔚来发布两年多来首款旗舰电动汽车后股价上涨10%
zh.summary: 中国电动汽车制造商蔚来在推出两年多来首款旗舰电动汽车后，股价上涨10%。此举反映了蔚来在中国汽车需求困难背景下扩大市场份额的战略。

title: Oil prices jump after US launches new attacks on Iran
summary: Oil prices rose following fresh U.S. military strikes against Iran, despite ongoing ceasefire negotiations between the two nations. The military action underscores geopolitical tensions that continue to influence energy markets.
content: The strikes come despite a ceasefire between Tehran and Washington as the two countries hold peace talks.

zh.title: 美国对伊朗发动新攻击后油价上升
zh.summary: 尽管美伊两国正在进行停火谈判，美国对伊朗的新军事打击仍导致油价上升。这一军事行动凸显了继续影响能源市场的地缘政治紧张局势。

title: Silver could fall further after latest slump, analysts say as they warn of demand destruction
summary: Analysts warn that silver prices could decline further after a recent downturn, as elevated levels following last year's 140% surge have reduced buyer demand across industries. Rising prices may ultimately undermine the commodity's market strength.
content: Silver's rally of over 140% last year is deterring buyers in various industries and its elevated price levels are beginning to weigh on demand, UBS said.

zh.title: 分析师警告银价可能进一步下跌，需求遭到破坏
zh.summary: 分析师警告称，在最近下滑后，白银价格可能进一步下降。去年上涨140%后的高位已削弱各行业的购买需求。价格上升最终可能削弱该商品的市场强度。

title: 'King of Cashmere' CEO on outperforming the luxury slowdown: Don't be greedy
summary: Brunello Cucinelli CEO Riccardo Stefanelli attributes the luxury brand's resilience during market slowdowns to prioritizing long-term brand integrity over short-term profit margins. The philosophy demonstrates an alternative to aggressive pricing strategies in luxury goods.
content: Brunello Cucinelli's success is tied to its ethos of choosing long-term integrity over short-term margin chasing, CEO Riccardo Stefanelli told CNBC.

zh.title: "羊绒之王"首席执行官谈奢侈品放缓中的表现：不要贪心
zh.summary: Brunello Cucinelli首席执行官Riccardo Stefanelli将该奢侈品牌在市场放缓期间的韧性归因于优先考虑长期品牌完整性而非短期利润。这一理念展示了奢侈品领域对激进定价策略的替代方案。

title: LG Energy Solution's shares surge as much as 16% after landing major U.S. battery storage deal
summary: LG Energy Solution's stock surged up to 16% following a major battery storage contract in the United States. The deal marks the South Korean company's expanding footprint in the growing U.S. energy storage market.
content: The deal comes as the South Korean battery company expands its energy storage systems business in the U.S.

zh.title: LG能源解决方案公司获得美国重大电池储能交易后股价上涨16%
zh.summary: LG能源解决方案公司在获得美国电池储能重大合同后股价上涨至16%。该交易标志着这家韩国公司在美国不断增长的能源储存市场中的业务范围扩大。

title: Kuwait air defenses activated against 'missile and drone threats'; U.S. carries out new strikes in Iran
summary: Kuwait activated its air defense systems against reported missile and drone threats as U.S. military operations in Iran intensify. The escalation highlights ongoing Middle Eastern tensions despite peace negotiations.
content: This comes as tensions in the Middle East escalated once again, with the U.S. military carrying out new strikes overnight in Iran.

zh.title: 科威特防空系统启动应对"导弹和无人机威胁"；美国对伊朗进行新的打击
zh.summary: 科威特启动防空系统应对报告中的导弹和无人机威胁，因为美国在伊朗的军事行动加剧。这一升级突出了尽管有和平谈判但中东仍在进行的紧张局势。

title: The number of 401(k) millionaires just fell — but workers hit record savings rates. What’s going on?
summary: Fidelity data reveals a decline in the number of 401(k) millionaires despite workers achieving record savings rates in the first quarter. This apparent paradox reflects market volatility and changing retirement savings patterns.
content: Fidelity’s first-quarter data shows 401(k) balances dipping — but it’s not all bad news.

zh.title: 401(k)百万富翁人数刚刚下降——但工人储蓄率创记录。发生了什么？
zh.summary: 富达数据显示，尽管工人在第一季度实现了创纪录的储蓄率，但401(k)百万富翁的数量有所下降。这个明显的悖论反映了市场波动和退休储蓄模式的变化。

title: Australia sues US giant 3M over 'forever chemicals' in firefighting foam
summary: Australia has filed a A$2 billion lawsuit against U.S. company 3M over contamination from 'forever chemicals' in firefighting foam at defense sites. The case represents the largest environmental action the Australian government has undertaken.
content: The A$2bn case, which centres on contamination at defence sites, is the largest ever brought by the government.

zh.title: 澳大利亚起诉美国3M公司在消防泡沫中使用"永久化学物质"
zh.summary: 澳大利亚对美国公司3M提起了20亿澳元的诉讼，因为其在防卫基地消防泡沫中的"永久化学物质"污染。该案代表了澳大利亚政府迄今为止采取的最大环保行动。

title: Fed’s Kashkari says inflation fight takes priority as labor market is 'in decent shape'
summary: Minneapolis Fed President warns that persistent inflation could embed itself in consumer expectations, potentially requiring stricter policy measures. The Fed prioritizes inflation control while assessing the labor market as adequately healthy.
content: The Minneapolis Fed President warned that persistently high inflation risks becoming embedded in consumer expectations, potentially forcing tougher policy action later.

zh.title: 美联储卡什卡里表示通胀防控是优先事项，劳动力市场"状况良好"
zh.summary: 明尼阿波利斯联邦储备银行主席警告，持久的通胀可能会根植于消费者预期，可能需要采取更严格的政策措施。美联储在评估劳动力市场充分健康的同时，优先考虑通胀控制。

title: Oil jumps after fresh U.S. strikes in Iran revive Strait of Hormuz disruption fears
summary: Oil prices rose following renewed U.S. strikes in Iran, as markets worry about potential disruptions to shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. The geopolitical tensions threaten global energy supplies and critical trade routes.
content: Oil prices rose on Thursday after fresh U.S. strikes in Iran renewed concerns over disruptions to commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美国对伊朗进行新一轮打击后油价上升，霍尔木兹海峡中断担忧重燃
zh.summary: 美国对伊朗进行新一轮打击后油价上涨，市场担心霍尔木兹海峡的航运可能会出现中断。地缘政治紧张局势威胁全球能源供应和关键贸易路线。

title: S&P 500 futures are little changed as Wall Street awaits key April inflation reading: Live updates
summary: Stock futures remain flat as traders anticipate the April PCE price index release, the Federal Reserve's preferred inflation measure, due Thursday morning. Market sentiment hinges on this critical inflation data.
content: April's reading of the personal consumption expenditure price index, the Fed's preferred inflation gauge, is due out at 8:30 a.m. on Thursday.

zh.title: 华尔街等待关键的4月通胀数据期间，标普500期货基本持平：实时更新
zh.summary: 在交易员期待4月PCE物价指数发布之际，股指期货保持平稳，PCE物价指数是美联储首选的通胀衡量指标，将在周四早上发布。市场情绪取决于这一关键通胀数据。

title: Snowflake’s stock surges nearly 40% as AI acceleration drives record product-revenue growth
summary: Snowflake stock jumped toward record highs after beating earnings expectations, raising guidance, and announcing a $6 billion AWS partnership expansion. The surge reflects strong AI-driven demand for the data platform's services.
content: Snowflake’s stock soars toward a record gain after an earnings beat, a raised outlook and a $6 billion commitment to expand its collaboration with Amazon’s AWS.

zh.title: Snowflake股票暴涨近40%，AI加速推动产品收入创纪录增长
zh.summary: Snowflake股票在超过财报预期、上调指导并宣布与AWS的60亿美元合作扩展后跳升至历史高位。股价上涨反映了对该数据平台服务强劲的AI驱动需求。

title: Marvell’s stock falls despite ‘exceptional’ AI demand driving a stronger growth outlook
summary: Custom-chip maker Marvell stock declined despite reporting strong AI demand and projecting accelerating revenue growth for the rest of the fiscal year. The market reaction suggests investors expected even stronger near-term results.
content: The custom-chip maker says revenue growth is expected “to continue accelerating each quarter” for the rest of the fiscal year.

zh.title: 尽管'异常'AI需求推动增长前景向好，Marvell股票反而下跌
zh.summary: 定制芯片制造商Marvell股票下跌，尽管报告了强劲的AI需求并预测本财年余期收入增速加快。市场反应表明投资者预期更强的短期业绩。

title: Salesforce shares dip on soft revenue outlook as AI disruption concerns linger
summary: Salesforce shares declined despite its Agentforce AI offering gaining traction, as the company's forward revenue guidance disappointed investors. AI adoption concerns persist despite software vendors' efforts to showcase AI solutions.
content: While the company’s Agentforce offering is picking up steam, Salesforce didn’t deliver the top-line growth investors wanted to see

zh.title: Salesforce股票因收入指引疲软而下跌，AI颠覆担忧挥之不去
zh.summary: Salesforce股票下跌，尽管其Agentforce AI产品获得关注，但该公司的前瞻收入指导令投资者失望。尽管软件供应商努力展示AI解决方案，但对AI采用的担忧仍然存在。

title: Mark Zuckerberg says a Meta cloud computing business 'definitely on the table'
summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg indicated the company could enter cloud computing if it overbuilds data center capacity. This signals Meta's potential pivot from internal AI infrastructure spending to offering cloud services.
content: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg said his company could enter the cloud computing market if it overspends on data centers and has excess capacity.

zh.title: 马克·扎克伯格表示Meta云计算业务"确实在考虑之中"
zh.summary: Meta首席执行官马克·扎克伯格表示，如果公司过度建设数据中心容量，该公司可能进入云计算领域。这表明Meta可能从内部人工智能基础设施支出转向提供云服务。

title: Asia-Pacific markets open lower as Iran-U.S. negotiations remain in focus
summary: Asia-Pacific equities opened lower as investors monitor ongoing Iran-U.S. negotiations, reflecting geopolitical uncertainty affecting regional markets. Regional sentiment remains cautious amid broader Middle East tensions.
content: Asia-Pacific markets opened lower on Thursday as investors parse the ongoing Iran-U.S. negotiations

zh.title: 亚太市场低开，伊朗-美国谈判仍受关注
zh.summary: 随着投资者关注正在进行的伊朗-美国谈判，亚太股市低开，反映了影响地区市场的地缘政治不确定性。在中东局势紧张的背景下，地区情绪仍然谨慎。

title: Inside India newsletter: Iran war disruptions, Modi's appeal to boost India's hospitality sector
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi's push for citizens to avoid foreign travel is benefiting the domestic travel and hospitality industry. Geopolitical tensions are reshaping travel patterns to favor local tourism.
content: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi's appeal to curb foreign travel is proving to be a boon to the local travel industry.

zh.title: 《印度内幕》通讯：伊朗战争中断，莫迪呼吁提振印度酒店业
zh.summary: 印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪推动公民避免出国旅行，这使国内旅游和酒店业受益。地缘政治紧张局势正在重塑旅游模式，以支持本地旅游。
